title: Orbital Nuke
description: Orbital Nuke and Stab - inspired by Wemmbu's Orbital cannon in the Unstable Universe.
body:
A server-only Fabric mod providing operators with precision orbital strike capabilities via command-issued targeting rods. Includes a Nuke mode for large-area explosive impact and a Stab mode for concentrated vertical strikes. Built for controlled use in events, moderation, or world altering gameplay scenarios, and inspired by Wemmbu’s orbital cannon from Unstable Universe.
# Current Commands
  - /orbital nuke destructive
  - /orbital nuke kinetic (Kinetic Does **NOT** Destroy Blocks)
 - /orbital stab
 - /orbital pulse
